G0.label:
Φ : Type
inst✝ : DecidableEq Φ
l r : List Φ
Γ✝ Δ : List (Form Φ)
φ ψ : Form Φ
Γ : List (Form Φ)
ih₁ : Decidable (Cal l r Γ [φ])
ih₂ : Decidable (Cal l r (ψ :: Γ) [])
⊢ Decidable (Cal l r (φ ⇒ ψ :: Γ) [])

G1.label:
Φ : Type
inst : DecidableEq Φ
l r : List Φ
Γ_1 Δ : List (Form Φ)
φ ψ : Form Φ
Γ : List (Form Φ)
ih₁ : Decidable (Cal l r Γ [φ])
ih₂ : Decidable (Cal l r (ψ :: Γ) [])
⊢ Decidable (Cal l r (φ ⇒ ψ :: Γ) [])
